input.headline: Tell us: have you ever received a terrible Secret Santa?

raw.headline: Tell us: have you ever received a terrible Secret Santa?

winner: My Secret Santa gave me a gift card for a store that doesn’t exist yet, with an expiration date set to next Tuesday—after they’re supposed to open.

candidates.text: I told my boss I'd never gotten a bad Secret Santa — then he handed me a live chicken and said, "You're fired.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 9.0, "reason": "Surprising twist with specific, vivid imagery and concise delivery."}

candidates.text: I once received such a terrible Secret Santa gift that I spent three hours trying to figure out how to return it, only to realize it was a "Get Well Soon" card from the person who had actually died during the party.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 9.0, "reason": "Surprising twist with dark humor, concise and specific, though slightly edgy."}

candidates.text: My Secret Santa gave me a gift—my name written on a napkin. I was too polite to ask if this was a *taste* of things to come.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising twist with clever wordplay on 'taste' and politeness, concise and specific joke that fits the headline well."}

candidates.text: My Secret Santa was so terrible that he actually showed up in person and tried to sell me my own childhood memories at a 20% markup.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising and specific twist with clever wordplay on 'Secret Santa' and childhood memories."}

candidates.text: Have you ever received a terrible Secret Santa? I did — and let me tell you, it was a real gift from the grave.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Pun on 'gift from the grave' adds surprise and specificity, concise and funny with natural English."}

candidates.text: My Secret Santa gave me a gift card for a store that doesn’t exist yet, with an expiration date set to next Tuesday—after they’re supposed to open.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising twist with a specific, imaginative scenario that's both concise and funny."}

candidates.text: My Secret Santa gave me a box of nothing, which is a real gift of silence.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 7.5, "reason": "The joke is concise and has a clever twist with 'gift of silence,' but the humor could be more surprising or specific to elevate it further."}

candidates.text: I received a terrible Secret Santa — turns out he was just a guy named Steve who really hated Christmas.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat surprising and specific, but the humor is mild and relies on a weak punchline that doesn't fully land."}

candidates.text: Me? Never received a terrible Secret Santa—my gift was so bad that everyone *wanted* it!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat surprising but lacks specificity and has a slight logical inconsistency (if the gift was so bad everyone wanted it, how is that a terrible Secret Santa?)." }
